movements.name: Surge-Echo
movements.description: The Surge speaks first; Echo answers from the far wall

movements.name: Hold-Rise
movements.description: Suspension trembles; the sigh of ascent lifts through

movements.name: Warp-Abstraction
movements.description: Djynxx: the Warp churns; the pattern eats itself static

movements.name: Gate-Sink
movements.description: Murrumur: the Gate opens; the Sink swallows what passes

movements.name: Plex-Return
movements.description: Plex radiates into Surge — the cycle closes, breath resumes
